lesson.menu_desc: Like and Love (+ -ing) and Free Time Vocabulary -- 28 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 10 -- Free Time and Hobbies -- Like and Love (+ -ing) and Free Time Vocabulary
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Dienane Brandão de Mesquita | Aula 10 -- Free Time and Hobbies

listenings.text: Hi, let me tell you about my free time. I work a lot during the week, but I love my weekend. In my free time, I like reading books and I love cooking for my family. On Saturday, I dance at a class near my house. I cannot swim very fast, but I like swimming in the river with my children. In the evening, we watch a movie together and listen to music. My free time is short, but it makes me very happy.

Good morning, everyone. Let me tell you about my perfect weekend. I have a busy job, so my free time is important to me. On Saturday morning, I love cooking a big breakfast. Then I read the news and listen to music. In the afternoon, I go to the beach with my friends. I like swimming and I love dancing in the evening. On Sunday, I watch a movie at home and rest. I do not like working on the weekend. I like my hobbies too much!

extra_audio.text: On Saturday, Dienane reads a book in the morning. Then she cooks lunch for her family. In the afternoon, she goes to her dance class. In the evening, they watch a movie together. At night, she listens to music before bed.
